context: Tests whether the response designs a correct distributed rate limiting system.

checklist.name: Uses centralized store for multi-instance
checklist.description: Recognizes that multiple server instances need a shared store (Redis, Memcached) for consistent rate limiting

checklist.name: Describes a valid algorithm
checklist.description: Uses a recognized rate limiting algorithm: sliding window, token bucket, leaky bucket, or fixed window counter

checklist.name: Returns correct HTTP headers
checklist.description: Includes X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset (or Retry-After) headers

checklist.name: Returns 429 status code
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 429 Too Many Requests when the limit is exceeded

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Rate limiting concepts and implementation details are technically correct
